Who I Am

Clean books.
Confident decisions.

I'm Jeaneth, a Certified Bookkeeper and Xero/QBO ProAdvisor based in Polomolok, South Cotabato. With over 6 years of corporate accounting experience across AP, AR, disbursement, and POS management roles, I understand exactly what keeps a business financially healthy.

My mission is to help business owners maintain organized, error-free financial records — so you can focus on growth while I handle the numbers. Whether you need ongoing bookkeeping, AR/AP management, or cloud accounting setup and support, I bring corporate-level accuracy to every engagement.

🎯
Accuracy First
Every transaction is verified. Every account is reconciled. No guesswork, no shortcuts.
🔒
Confidentiality
Your financial data is handled with discretion and the highest standards of integrity.
⏰
Deadline-Driven
Reports and deliverables completed on time, every time — because your business can't wait.
☁️
Cloud-First Workflow
Fluent in QuickBooks Online and Xero — your books accessible anytime, anywhere.
What I Offer

Services

📒
Full-Cycle Bookkeeping

Day-to-day transaction recording, general ledger maintenance, and month-end closing — so your books are always clean and audit-ready.

QBOXeroMonth-End Close
📥
Accounts Receivable

Invoice generation, collections monitoring, AR aging analysis, and client follow-ups to keep your cash flow healthy and on track.

InvoicingCollectionsAR Aging
📤
Accounts Payable

Supplier invoice processing, expense coding, payment scheduling, and vendor reconciliation to keep your payables accurate and on time.

Vendor PaymentsAP Reconciliation
🔍
Bank Reconciliation

Thorough bank and account reconciliations to identify discrepancies early and keep your financial records reliable.

Bank ReconGL Reconciliation
📊
Financial Reporting

Preparation of financial statements, account schedules, and management reports that give you a clear picture of your business's financial health.

P&LBalance SheetSchedules
☁️
QBO & Xero Setup

Setup, migration, and ongoing management of your QuickBooks Online or Xero account — so you start clean and stay organized from day one.

QBO ProAdvisorXero Certified

Experience

Accounts Payable In-Charge
Adventurers Multi-Purpose Cooperative · Philippines
Oct 2022 – May 2025
  • Managed full-cycle AP operations including invoice entry, vendor payments, and month-end closings using Active Accounting Software
  • Processed 30+ payment requests daily with accurate expense coding, approval routing, and timely disbursements
  • Reconciled vendor statements monthly and resolved payment discrepancies, reducing overdue payables by 35%
  • Ensured compliance with internal controls and audit requirements across all AP functions
  • Coordinated with procurement and finance teams to validate purchase orders and improve workflow efficiency
Accounts Receivable In-Charge
RDEX Food International Phils., Inc. · Philippines
Feb 2014 – Mar 2015
  • Posted daily AR transactions and matched receipts to invoices for accurate revenue reporting and month-end closing
  • Prepared and issued Statements of Account, supporting timely collections and client relationship management
  • Maintained error-free customer ledgers in Exact Globe ERP and resolved billing discrepancies through direct client follow-ups
Disbursement In-Charge & POS In-Charge
RDEX Food International Phils., Inc. · Philippines
Apr 2015 – Mar 2017
  • Processed 100+ weekly payment requests via Exact Globe ERP check runs, ensuring accurate and on-time disbursements
  • Consolidated daily sales data from 12 retail branches via POS systems and uploaded to ERP via CSV for accurate revenue recognition
  • Verified Z-read reports against bank deposit slips, maintaining 100% accuracy in daily reconciliation
